message: Hi Jamie — wanted to reach out because as a Founder at a Series A B2B SaaS your week is probably consumed with hiring SDRs and manually researching prospects which is exactly the problem we solve with our persona-reviewed outbound personalization platform that we built specifically for founders like you who are scaling outbound teams and want to avoid the trap of templated outreach that burns goodwill on day one and so my ask is very simple just a 10 minute call next week where I can show you how we turn one hour of profile research into a tailored first message that survives a four-persona review including a compliance reviewer and a spam filter so you can ship outbound at the quality bar of a hand-written note from a friend instead of the slop most cold-email tools produce.
